content_body:
"Many go fishing all their lives without knowing that it is not fish they are after." 

 - Henry David Thoreau

Special father and son activities abound in Blue Ridge, the activity and adventure epicenter of the North Georgia Mountains. With the advent of gorgeous spring weather consisting of sunny skies and occasional afternoon thundershowers, cool mornings and extended days provide light well into the evening. Cabin Rentals of Georgia invites you to get away from the X-Boxes and the PlayStations and enjoy some fresh air while trying to perfect the art of landing those ever-elusive trout.  We offer several properties with direct access to frontage on the Toccoa River as well as luxury cabins for catch-and-release fishing on both Noontootla Creek. 

For a special father/son trip to Blue Ridge, a stay at Cherokee Sunrise on Noontootla Creek is the quintessential mountain fishing getaway. Situated on 30 acres with a well-stocked pond close to the farmhouse as well as Noontootla Creek frontage where you can fish without a guide from the bridge inward about 250 feet. For an absolutely incredible time, book one of our fishing guides and thrill at catching large bows and browns - all equipment for fly-fishing is provided. We have guests come from all over the country to stay on this property and fish with one of our guides. Don't miss out on this memorable experience!

If the whole family is coming to Blue Ridge, we have the perfect luxury cabin rental for you along the big waters of the Toccoa River and the Cherokee Indian Fish Trap ~ ideal for catching fish! Check out Fallen Timber Lodge or The River's Edge for a great family vacation that you will remember forever. 

Spending quiet time to bond, to share in your son's dreams, concerns and questions while enjoying an activity which allows for solitude and focus that will be a bonding experience to last a lifetime.  Unforgettable moments, successes as well as the "one" that got away moments and memories are yours for the making.  The common goal of simply catching fish allows father and son to be on an even field, yet the mature qualities of patience, wisdom and compassion that only a father can provide comes into play.  With all evidence pointing to the sad truth that many young men have social problems where there is not a strong father figure to guide them, we invite you to cherish your relationship with your boys, and maybe even a few of his friends that may be without that male role model.  Read more at  The Art of Manliness.  

You will never be unhappy when helping others.  "To go fishing is the chance to wash one's soul with pure air, with the rush of the brook, or the shimmer of sun on blue waters.  It brings meekness and inspiration from the decency of nature, charity toward tackle-makers, patience toward fish, a mockery of profits and egos, an equality in the discipline of men  - for all men are equal before fish."   - Herbert Hoover, 31st US President
title: Father and Son Fishing Trip in Blue Ridge, GA
